name: Disclosure (Show/Hide)
about_this_pattern: A disclosure is a widget that enables content to be either collapsed (hidden) or expanded (visible). It has two elements: a disclosure button and a section of content whose visibility is controlled by the button. When the controlled content is hidden, the button is often styled as a typical push button with a right-pointing arrow or triangle to hint that activating the button will display additional content. When the content is visible, the arrow or triangle typically points down.

keyboard_interactions.description: activates the disclosure control and toggles the visibility of the disclosure content.
activates the disclosure control and toggles the visibility of the disclosure content.
